channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Star Fox Review: Can't quite teach an old Fox new tricks
item.description: The Switch 2 Star Fox remake comes with high-effort visuals and a fun battle mode, but its campaign feels stuck in the past.
item.content:encoded:
The Switch 2 Star Fox remake comes with high-effort visuals and a fun battle mode, but its campaign feels stuck in the past.

(Image credit: James Mastromarino/Nintendo)
item.dc:creator: James Perkins Mastromarino

item.title: Greetings from sweltering Switzerland
item.description: On the waterfront in Lucerne, Switzerland, soccer fans watched jumbo TVs showing a World Cup match played an ocean away. But the air felt more like the tropics.
item.content:encoded: On the waterfront in Lucerne, Switzerland, soccer fans watched jumbo TVs showing a World Cup match played an ocean away. But the air felt more like the tropics.
item.dc:creator: Rob Schmitz

item.title: IAEA chief says inspectors will visit nuclear sites under Iran-U.S. interim deal
item.description: The head of the U.N.'s nuclear agency has signaled that Iranian nuclear enrichment sites would be visited by his inspectors, a day after the U.S. and Iran offered contradictory remarks about the issue.
item.content:encoded:
The head of the U.N.'s nuclear agency has signaled that Iranian nuclear enrichment sites would be visited by his inspectors, a day after the U.S. and Iran offered contradictory remarks about the issue.

(Image credit: Kyodo News)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Congress passes major housing bill. And, Mamdani-backed candidates sweep NYC primaries
item.description: Congress has passed the largest housing affordability bill in decades. And all three candidates endorsed by New York City mayor Zohran Mamdani have won their primaries.
item.content:encoded:
Congress has passed the largest housing affordability bill in decades. And all three candidates endorsed by New York City mayor Zohran Mamdani have won their primaries. 

(Image credit: Heather Diehl)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: Political consultant on whether Trump is losing GOP support after war powers vote
item.description: NPR's A Martínez asks Republican political consultant Doug Heye about whether Trump is losing support among congressional Republicans after the Senate voted to limit his war powers on Iran.
item.content:encoded: NPR's A Martínez asks Republican political consultant Doug Heye about whether Trump is losing support among congressional Republicans after the Senate voted to limit his war powers on Iran.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez

item.title: 4 ways to design a dreamy summer, according to a happiness expert
item.description: Don't let the season fly by. Gretchen Rubin, host of the Happier podcast, shares exercises to help you get what you want out of summer. Fill out the printable worksheet and stick it on your fridge.
item.content:encoded: Don't let the season fly by. Gretchen Rubin, host of the Happier podcast, shares exercises to help you get what you want out of summer. Fill out the printable worksheet and stick it on your fridge.
item.dc:creator: Marielle Segarra

item.title: 5 years after the Surfside condo collapse, the toll of the tragedy remains
item.description: Surfside, Florida, is marking five years since a beachfront condominium collapsed, killing 98 people. It was one of the largest structural failures in U.S. history.
item.content:encoded:
Surfside, Florida, is marking five years since a beachfront condominium collapsed, killing 98 people. It was one of the largest structural failures in U.S. history.

(Image credit: Joe Raedle)
item.dc:creator: Marisa Peñaloza

item.title: Why are crisis pregnancy centers saying they can 'rule out' ectopic pregnancy?
item.description: Under President Trump, more federal attention and support has gone towards anti-abortion Christian centers. A watchdog group says many of them mislead patients with promises to "rule out" ectopic pregnancies.
item.content:encoded:
Under President Trump, more federal attention and support has gone towards anti-abortion Christian centers. A watchdog group says many of them mislead patients with promises to "rule out" ectopic pregnancies.

(Image credit: Taylor Glascock for The Washington Post)
item.dc:creator: Selena Simmons-Duffin

item.title: Inside the gold-mining town where the Ebola outbreak likely started
item.description: NPR reports from Mongbwalu in the Democratic Republic of Congo. The fight to contain the virus faces obstacles from lack of supplies to residents who doubt that the virus is real.
item.content:encoded:
NPR reports from Mongbwalu in the Democratic Republic of Congo. The fight to contain the virus faces obstacles from lack of supplies to residents who doubt that the virus is real.

(Image credit: Arsène Mpiana for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Emmet Livingstone

item.title: New York primary could forecast future for Democrats. Here's what you need to know
item.description: New York's primary election highlighted a question the Democratic Party is facing: Just how progressive does it want to be? In safe seats, progressives win, but in competitive seats, moderates prevail.
item.content:encoded:
New York's primary election highlighted a question the Democratic Party is facing: Just how progressive does it want to be? In safe seats, progressives win, but in competitive seats, moderates prevail.

(Image credit: Michael M. Santiago)
item.dc:creator: Elena Moore
